游戏.title: TennoCon 2026: Everything Announced at the Warframe and Soulframe Fan Event
游戏.summary: Here's everything announced at TennoCon 2026, including all the latest news and trailers on Warframe and Soulframe.

游戏.title: EU Says It's Powerless to Stop PlayStation From Killing Discs: 'Companies Are Free to Offer Games and Services in the Manner They See Fit'
游戏.summary: As gamers sign online petitions and swarm upon each and every PlayStation social media post, the EU has said it’s powerless to actually stop Sony — and indeed any company — from killing discs.

游戏.title: Warframe's next major update blends Blade Runner, The Sopranos, and film noir in a whole new solar system, coming later this year
游戏.summary: Digital Extremes has wrapped up this year's Tennocon Live event with a massive reveal trailer for Warframe 's next major update: Warframe: Tau. This update brings players to a Blade Runner and Sopranos-inspired locale, and tackles themes of addiction and its dangers head-on. Read more

游戏.title: "This is our Spider-Man 3" - Soulfame's Warsong update adds "edgelord" progression path later this year
游戏.summary: Digital Extremes has revealed a lenghty new gameplay trailer for its fantasy action game Soulframe. It's next major update - Warsong - adds a new quest. It'll also come with rideable mounts and "vegan" fishing. Read more

游戏.title: id Software insists in new statement that it still has "the crew we need to build the games and tech we're known for"
游戏.summary: id Software has posted a brief statement on social media, thanking players and well-wishers "for the support" and insisting that despite the recent job cuts, "we still have the crew we need to build the games." Read more

游戏.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced opens to 2 million sales on launch day
游戏.summary: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced is off to a "strong start", selling two million copies on launch day. Read more

游戏.title: "I sued their asses and won!" Gamer wins legal battle to get hacked Xbox account back after they were told to rebuy all their digital games
游戏.summary: Xbox has lost a legal battle in Brazil after a gamer "sued their asses and won" for suspending their account, along with all of their digital games, after it was hacked. Read more

游戏.title: EU admits it cannot stop Sony killing physical discs – "companies are free to offer games and services in the manner that they see fit"
游戏.summary: The European Union has confirmed it cannot prevent Sony from scrapping physical discs, stating "companies are free to offer games and services in the manner that they see fit". Read more

游戏.title: Obsidian game director reacts to people "spouting off" about the studio and how it's not what it "used to be"
游戏.summary: A director at Obsidian Entertainment has shared their thoughts about the "extremely difficult week" at the studio, stressing how hard it's been to see "a bunch of cold take artists coming out of the woodwork" and "spouting off" about "what Obsidian is or what it isn't". Read more
